testcase.name: createCart

Request method: POST Request URI: https://fakestoreapi.com/carts Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "userId": 5, "date": "2020-02-03", "products": [ { "productId": 5, "quantity": 1 } ] } HTTP/1.1 201 Created Date: Tue, 30 Jun 2026 11:24:06 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 82 Connection: keep-alive Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Etag: W/"52-13ul1SQJZt3QyUScDPQ3GFAeSUc" X-Powered-By: Express Cf-Cache-Status: DYNAMIC Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=a8%2FNb0PKM1djoN0b%2BCm9UI%2B1iEsan3Si8yTdN6EY6b2LJs8jni5U3hWM6IOVs3otZ88SrV1l6grCtyxN6zvFwknGmDec1o0zwe9FaHzvs3MmwcjBdY0Uh6MezerzgxQjkwwB"}]} Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Server: cloudflare CF-RAY: a13ccd7b0931f8fe-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
